Overrides.Override: Arcane Surge also grants 15% increased Life Regeneration Rate to you Limited to 1 Runegraft of Resurgence
Spells have Added Spell Damage equal to 30% of Physical Damage of your Equipped Two handed Weapon Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Spellbound

Skill.source: Item:37:Shroud of the Lightless, Carnal Armour

Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Foul Prism Hypnotic Eye Jewel Unique ID: fe22e8547f68df938de4041bbc6aa5203b1cfe01804fc35f5ea3ea10ba9099dd Item Level: 80 LevelReq: 28 Implicits: 0 {fractured}6% increased Cast Speed if you've dealt a Critical Strike Recently +26 to maximum Life +10% to all Elemental Resistances 10% increased Damage over Time while Dual Wielding Fractured Item

Rarity: RARE New Item Helical Ring Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.014}IncreasedLife5 Suffix: {range:0.239}Strength9 Suffix: {range:0.271}Dexterity9 Suffix: {range:0.863}IncreasedCastSpeed3 Suffix: None LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 4 -2 Prefix Modifiers allowed +1 Suffix Modifier allowed Implicit Modifiers Cannot Be Changed 50% increased Suffix Modifier magnitudes +88 to Strength +88 to Dexterity 26% increased Cast Speed +70 to maximum Life +40% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier

Input.name: customMods
